title: Output
description:
- responsible for writing output data to a file or files
- handles the details of writing the data, including the format and location
- collaborates with other classes to ensure the data is written correctly
- may collaborate with classes that handle compression, encryption, or other processing of the data
- follows the OutputFormat interface to define the behavior of writing output data
- implements the RecordWriter interface to handle the actual writing of the data
- provides a template method for getting the RecordWriter, allowing subclasses to customize the writing process
- uses the PathOutputCommitterFactory to create committers that handle the commit and abort of the output files
